hovers.contents:
Card: `UR-raw-pointer-alignment-is-aligned-guard-src-lib-rs-read-header-operation-raw_pointer_read-raw-pointer-read-2ac86bae2dcf-pointer_validity-c1`; priority `high`; confidence `medium`

Location: src/lib.rs:11

Why this card exists:
- The changed code contains a `raw_pointer_read` unsafe operation that unsafe-review classifies as `guard_missing`.
- Operation: `Some(unsafe { ptr.cast::<Header>().read() })`

Proof path: `source_route_only`

Relevant hazard families:
- `pointer_validity`
- `alignment`
- `initialized_memory`
- `same_allocation`

Required safety conditions:
- pointer is live and dereferenceable for the accessed type
- buffer has enough bytes for the accessed type
- pointer is aligned for the accessed type
- memory is initialized for the accessed type
- access remains inside one live allocation

Evidence found:
- Contract [present]: Nearby `SAFETY:` comment was detected
- Guard/discharge [missing]: Some inferred safety obligations are missing local guard evidence
- Reach [unreached]: No static test mention of owner `read_header` was found
- Witness [missing]: No imported witness receipt was found

Evidence missing:
- Missing visible local guard for inferred safety obligations
- No related test path was found by static search
- No witness receipt imported for this card

What would resolve this:
- Add or expose local guards for these `raw_pointer_read` safety obligations: (1) pointer is live and dereferenceable for the accessed type, (2) memory is initialized for the accessed type, (3) access remains inside one live allocation.

Verify commands:
- `cargo +nightly miri test read_header`
- `cargo +nightly careful test read_header`

What would not resolve this:
- A `SAFETY:` comment alone does not discharge missing guard evidence.
- A related test mention is not proof that this unsafe site executed.
- Do not claim witness proof unless a matching receipt exists.
- Do not widen unsafe scope, suppress the card, or change unrelated unsafe code to silence this review item.

Witness route: `miri` because Pure-Rust UB-adjacent hazard; Miri is the strongest concrete-execution witness when the path is supported.

Reach note: static related-test evidence does not prove the unsafe site executed.

Handoff commands:
- Explain: `unsafe-review explain UR-raw-pointer-alignment-is-aligned-guard-src-lib-rs-read-header-operation-raw_pointer_read-raw-pointer-read-2ac86bae2dcf-pointer_validity-c1`
- Agent context: `unsafe-review context UR-raw-pointer-alignment-is-aligned-guard-src-lib-rs-read-header-operation-raw_pointer_read-raw-pointer-read-2ac86bae2dcf-pointer_validity-c1 --json`

Trust boundary: static unsafe contract review only; not memory-safety proof, not UB-free status, not Miri-clean status, and not a site-execution claim unless a matching witness receipt says so.
